name: codex-proxy
description: Multi-upstream model routing proxy for Codex — ChatGPT subscription, OpenAI API, and DeepSeek

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/launcher.js && node --check src/mode.js && node --check src/edge/edge-config.js && node --check src/edge/edge-server.js && node --check src/edge/gateway-client.js && node --check src/edge/local-account-store.js && node --check src/edge/local-handoff.js && node --check src/provider-worker/config.js && node --check src/provider-worker/protocol.js && node --check src/provider-worker/nonce-store.js && node --check src/provider-worker/turn-store.js && node --check src/provider-worker/execution-store.js && node --check src/provider-worker/mock-executor.js && node --check src/provider-worker/chatgpt-sub-executor.js && node --check src/provider-worker/server.js && node --check index.js && npm run check --workspace @ai-editor/gateway && npm run check --workspace @ai-editor/admin-web
scripts.test:gateway-stack: npm run gateway:test && npm run admin:test
